bushes of elderberry growing in the right along the greenway, competing with amur honeysuckle and other invasive bushes, they put out huge amounts of flowers in 2021, which make good fritters; the berries can be cooked and used to make wine, jams and jellies,

here is a patch of several pawpaw trees, one maybe 10 - 15 feet high, many younger trees (probably suckers from the older tree), lower to the ground only one to three feet high.
